subject: [SDNC] Add SDNR Websocket support
commit_message:
[SDNC] Add SDNR Websocket support

new service and env for websocket in sdnr

Issue-ID: OOM-3169
Change-Id: I4b890475a10cb0f8ebd5ec1955ed4c944914be98
Signed-off-by: demskeq8 <alexander.dehn@highstreet-technologies.com>

Patch Set 5:

Hi Alexander,
be aware, that the sdnc-web image update is included in the patch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/134393
which I will merge today after a successfull gating.
Maybe you will need to rebase this patch afterwards.
Best regards
Andreas

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> Hi Alexander,
> be aware, that the sdnc-web image update is included in the patch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/134393
> which I will merge today after a successfull gating.
> Maybe you will need to rebase this patch afterwards.
> Best regards
> Andreas

Hi Andreas, 
thanks for point me on this!
It might happen that sdnc-web-image based pod will not come up with 2.5.2 and gating fails.
This is due required correction in this patch set.

Anyway if you merge 134393 I will rebase on master again.

Kind regards, Alex

Patch Set 5:

I have to say, that the new sdnc image has issues.
1. the healthcheck for sdnc is failing (404)
2. so-sdnc-adapter connection to sdnc fails with 401, therefor the smoke usecases fail

see:
https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/878982370
https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/879002691

> https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/879002691

In general I could not see issues with sdnc-image:2.5.2 in my private tests.
could you point me to the healthcheck test within the pipeline. Any chance to get the logs from sdnc pod?
Thx, Alex
